form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start racing on the pace over 295m at this track by 1.5 lengths in a Class 5. Goes very well from this draw including six wins. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Dominant winner leading throughout to post a big 8 lengths victory in a Class 4 last start at this track, clocking a scintillating 16.69 over the 295m trip. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 5 length third but did record a superb 16.90 over the 295m journey. A must include.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 4.5 lengths over 295m at this track in a handy (16.87), beating Busted Handle. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths second at this track but did record a brilliant 16.98 for the 295m trip. This appears within her reach.
